workExperience.title: Meat Market ADM
workExperience.description: Meat Market ADM assists the department manager in operations including customer and partner relations, merchandising, and financial performance

projects.name: GrubGuide (Solo App)
projects.shortDescription: A full-stack restaurant finder web application that leverages FourSqauare api and allows users to search for restaurants and cuisines by location. Users can manually enter a location or use geolocation to automatically find restaurants nearby. Built with the MERN stack and deployed on Render.
